calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-30-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Keith M. Velleca, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Irene Cheung, who was placed under oath and examined.
Defendant Wulman A. Moran did appear at today's hearing, but was precluded from participating in the proceedings due to the default entered against said defendant on February 11, 2008.
At the Court's discretion, the Doe Defendants were not dismissed at today's hearing.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Irene Cheung, and against the Defaulted Defendant Wulman A. Moran as follows:

Damages/Principal - $5,888.82.
Prejudgment Interest - $579.60.
Exemplary Damages - $17,988.53.
Costs - $543.05, for a total of $25,000.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Set For Trial On Jun-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
